# Cloudbox

Cloudbox spins up synthetic work environments for long-horizon agent evals on Cloudflare.

Primary pages:
- `/`: product homepage with dogfooded run snippet.
- `/docs`: seven-minute docs path.
- `/demo`: interactive generated Cloudbox.
- `/docs/research`: mapping from the Synthetic Computers at Scale paper to this implementation.

Core API:
- `GET /api/demo`
- `POST /api/generate`
- `POST /api/runs`
- `GET /api/artifacts/:id`
- `GET /api/export`
